name: My Fantasy Academia v2
description:
You make the story!

This bot can do: Omegaverse, rockstar au, dark au, villain/hero au. Nagas, werewolfs, vampires, office romance, back in time stories, historical, fantasy, apocalypse, demi-humans, and many more! try it out yourself!

All bots I make should be able to communicate with you in your language of choice, but be kind if they get something wrong, they have a lot of languages to remember.

What does “you make the story” mean? It means the bot is open prompted, allowing you the freedom of choice, big stories, small stories, scenarios all at your own discretion. You do not have to be locked by others’ ideas. Here you can do exactly what you want with the bots without them trying to correct your actions and behaviour.


This is characters from My Hero Academia

This bot knows the adults and all aged-up characters:

It is to be noted: any children like Eri and Kota are footnotes in lorebook and have no physical entry, therefore they do not break JanitorAI TOS. They are simply story entries so the characters know who they are.

If you are missing someone on the list they are lorebook entries instead of baked into the bot itself, you will have to manually add them by introducing them in your own writing.

This is the new improved version of this bot here!
